frame_analyses.description: Initial setup with 6 orange rubber objects in center bowl, all 12 pegs visible on board
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task not yet started, instruments not visible

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instruments positioned appropriately for bimanual manipulation

frame_analyses.description: Left grasper picking up first orange object from center bowl
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean pickup with left instrument, right instrument positioned for transfer

frame_analyses.description: First object being transferred from left to right grasper, one object now on right peg
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth midair transfer technique, object placement visible on right side

frame_analyses.description: Multiple objects now transferred to right side pegs, continuing forward direction transfers
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Consistent placement pattern, no objects dropped outside field

frame_analyses.description: All 6 objects successfully placed on right-side pegs, completing forward transfer phase
frame_analyses.technique_notes: All objects properly seated on pegs, ready for reverse direction

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper initiation of reverse transfer sequence

frame_analyses.description: Multiple objects being transferred back from right to left direction
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining good bimanual coordination during reverse phase

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean placement technique maintained throughout reverse phase

frame_analyses.description: Task completed - all 6 objects successfully transferred back to left-side pegs

confidence_rationale: Clear visual evidence of all 6 objects being transferred successfully in both directions. No objects observed dropping outside the field. Task completion clearly visible with all objects on final pegs.
cannot_determine: Exact sub-second timing transitions between phases due to frame sampling rate
technique_summary: Solid intermediate-level performance with consistent bimanual coordination. Completed task without penalties in 100 seconds, which falls in the intermediate range (60-120s).
strengths: No dropped objects or placement errors
Smooth bimanual coordination throughout both phases
Proper completion of both forward and reverse transfer sequences
improvement_suggestions: Work on increasing speed while maintaining accuracy to approach expert benchmark (40-60s)
Practice more efficient pickup and placement motions to reduce overall cycle time
